words.def: a base hit on which the batter scores a run
words.zh: n. 本壘打, 傳信鴿

words.def: English statesman who opposed Henry VIII's divorce from Catherine of Aragon and was imprisoned and beheaded; recalled for his concept of Utopia, the ideal state
where you live at a particular time
words.zh: n. 家, 避難所, 故鄉

words.def: a man distinguished by exceptional courage and nobility and strength
words.zh: n. 英雄, 超越常人者, 男主角

words.def: a mineral that contains metal that is valuable enough to be mined
